title: Richer Rewards for your Loyalty at IHG® Army Hotels
description: There’s a new reason to choose IHG Army Hotels: IHG One Rewards; the next chapter in guest loyalty.
text:
Military travelers stay at IHG® Army Hotels for all sorts of different reasons, but now, we’re pleased to announce a new reason to choose our hotels: IHG One Rewards, the new loyalty program by IHG Hotels & Resorts. Centered around its guests, IHG One Rewards is designed to offer members more personal choice, valuable points, and richer rewards than ever before. With more flexibility and control over their travel journeys, members have the ability to choose to be rewarded in the ways that matter most to them. The best part? Points earned can be redeemed for Reward nights at off-post locations across IHG Hotels & Resorts’ 17 brands and 6,000 hotels around the world*.
But, of course, those are far from the only benefits. Launched officially on June 8, 2022, IHG One Rewards also offers:
Faster Earn: A new tier and bonus point earning structure that allows members to earn more points faster and gain rewards sooner.
Richer Benefits: Further enhancements and member benefits include:
Free Hot Breakfast for 2** for Diamond Elite members as a Welcome Amenity choice
Exclusive access to Reward Night Discount Promotions for Platinum Elite and Diamond Elite members
Late Check-Out for all IHG One Rewards members (subject to availability)
More opportunities for Platinum Elite and Diamond Elite members to receive Early Check-In and Complimentary Room Upgrades, including suites if available.
Exceptional Choice: Recognizing that not all members want to use their points in the same way, IHG One Rewards marks the introduction of Milestone Rewards – a new, technology-enabled platform that will allow members to choose the rewards that matter most to them. Starting at just 20 qualified nights stayed, members will be offered a choice from a selection of rewards every 10 nights, through 100 nights stayed. These Milestone Rewards choices include points, Food & Beverage Rewards, Confirmable Suite Upgrades and Annual Lounge Membership†.
If you’d like to start earning, and enjoying rewards like these, enroll now and download the IHG One Rewards app, which puts the program in the palm of your hands, allowing you to track points, streamline booking, and check in faster — all from your mobile device. And if you’ve already earned points with our previous rewards program, don’t sweat it, all your points have transferred to IHG One Rewards.
Since the inception of IHG Army Hotels, we have awarded members a total of over 5 billion points! This is the equivalent to 198,000 reward nights‡ so get in on the action and start earning points of your own by signing up for IHG One Rewards here.
*Reward nights not available for stays at IHG Army Hotels
**Free breakfast is always offered at all IHG Army Hotels regardless of membership
†Some Milestone Rewards choices may not be available at IHG Army Hotels
‡Data collected through June of 2022; Reward nights equivalent based on average 25,000 points per night
***
